title: If the 14-month psilocybin openness gain was specific to the mystical-experience subgroup, could the open-appraisal consolidation's value be not in preventing decay but in widening the subgroup — helping the non-mystical participants reach the openness gain the mystical group got for free?
summary: A Castle room titled “If the 14-month psilocybin openness gain was specific to the mystical-experience subgroup, could the open-appraisal consolidation's value be not in preventing decay but in widening the subgroup — helping the non-mystical participants reach the openness gain the mystical group got for free?”.
